# CWE-346 safe: Origin Validation Error (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-346-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

var trustedOrigins = map[string]struct{}{
	"https://app.example.com": {},
}

func HandlePreflightReflect(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet && r.Method != http.MethodOptions {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	origin := r.Header.Get("Origin")
	if origin == "" {
		http.Error(w, "origin required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if _, ok := trustedOrigins[strings.TrimSpace(origin)]; !ok {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden origin", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", origin)
	w.Header().Set("Vary", "Origin")
	w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	w.Write([]byte(`{"status":"ok"}`))
}
